rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY OCTOBER 2, 2006, DEFENDANT CURTISS-WRIGHT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. BURDEN SHIFTED AND NO SUPPLEMENTAL PLEADINGS. =(302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support Thereof; Exhibits; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, OCTOBER 2, 2006, DEFENDANT EATON CORPORATION'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support Thereof; Exhibits; Proposed Order IS CONTINUED TO 10/25/06. OPPOSING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES PER SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 8.5. PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER CONFIRMING THE NEW HEARING DATE. =(302/AJR)

rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, OCTOBER 2, 2006, DEFENDANT GEORGIA-PACIFIC CORPORATION Georgia-Pacifics' Notice Of Joinder And Joinder And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Dismiss Or Stay For Forum Non Conveniens IS CONTINUED TO 10/25/06. rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment And Sanctions

rulings.Case Title: VOLCANO DRYWALL VS. EICON,INC., et al

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM FRANCIS FLAHAVAN VS. STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Defendant State Compensation Insurance Fund'S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, OCTOBER 2, 2006, DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. CONTRACT DOES NOT REQUIRE RETENTION OF DEPOSIT PAYMENT. =(302/AJR)

rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, OCTOBER 2, 2006, DEFENDANT AKAY & ASSOCIATES, DOUGLAS AKAY'S Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To Contract; Request For Judicial Notice; Declarations Of Scott L. Johnson And Douglas N. Akay In Support IS GRANTED. =(302/AJR/KD)

rulings.Case Title: JUDITH CHOW et al VS. THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, OCTOBER 2, 2006, DEFENDANT THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RAISE ARGUMENT AS TO PRECLUSION FOR FAILURE TO EXHAUST ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDY AT SUMMARY JUDGMENT. JUDICIAL NOTICE GRANTED EXCEPT AS TO MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING. =(302/AJR/AP)
